meaning: adv.小心翼翼地,谨慎的,极为小心地,慎重地adj.慎重的,谨慎的
examples: Gingerly, she put her hand in deeper, to the bottom.
She was touching the dressing gingerly with both hands.
He held up his forepaw as the Mole stepped gingerly down.
At 74, Kerry negotiates the boulders a little gingerly, but she knows her way around these rocks.
The fact is that a good plan treats the sexy arena of investments very gingerly.
